_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 06:37 UTC tick — 15 news_flash events (iran_ceasefire/us_iran_military/fed_fomc/us_tariff, mostly archive noise + 3 fresh Apr 20-21). 0 level/structure events. 0 positions, broker $1000. MATERIAL NEW INTEL (web-confirmed Anadolu/TRT/Fox/NBC/CNN): Iran LAUNCHED DRONE STRIKES on US vessels Sun Apr 19 retaliating USS Spruance seizure of M/V Touska in Gulf of Oman. US CENTCOM confirms seizure; Tasnim confirms Iranian drones deployed; US hasn't confirmed any vessels HIT. Iran NOT YET formally agreed Islamabad talks. Escalation ladder moved rung up (threat→kinetic). BUT tape still pricing deal optimism (oil -1.1%, USD bid, gold -0.79%) — disconnect. Gold escalation tilt STRENGTHENED. Also BusinessLine Apr 21: India-US bilateral trade deal talks RESTARTED on finer details (stock-pulse relevant, not forex). 1 MODIFY (gold note strengthen), 4 KEEP (audusd/usdjpy/oil/usdcad). Structure_watch KEEP 9, news queries 8 KEEP.

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Risk-off trigger requires TALKS COLLAPSE tonight (Iran vowed retaliation for seized tanker). Level 0.707 is ~1.1% below current 0.7178 — requires real catalyst not just drift. Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 2 (was 3 — catalyst not ratifying on Tue).

Break 158.50 = risk-off yen flight AND aligns w/ MoF pain threshold 158 (FXEmpire/MUFG Apr 16). Short on retest from below. Yen flight requires TALKS COLLAPSE or retaliation on seized tanker. If deal optimism holds, USDJPY floats — no reason for 158.50 break. SL 159.20, TP 157.00. Conv 3 (was 4 — catalyst not ratifying today).

WTI $88.26 (CNBC Apr 21 -1.51%), Brent $94.87 (-0.68%), broker shows WTI $86.24 bearish M15. Oil FADING Tue on peace-talk optimism, NOT +6% as prior tick. Safe-haven long on pullback into 4780-4810. Zone re-entered 06:22 UTC at 4781.765 (2x re-fire), both SKIPPED: no M15 bull BOS, gold -0.79%, tape pricing deal optimism. (b) Iranian Tasnim confirms DRONE STRIKES on US vessels in retaliation (US has not confirmed any hit). (c) Iran NOT formally agreed to Islamabad talks restart. (d) Trump: extension 'highly unlikely'. Wait M15 bull BOS + rejection wick on retest, OR news flash (US confirms vessel hit / retaliation strike on US / Iran skip confirmed). If deal struck → $4700s SL bleed. SL 4745, TP 4900/5000. Conv 4.

H1 bear FVG zone. Alert FIRED passively 06:02 UTC at 1.36503 — SKIPPED: M15 bar_close showed NO bear BOS, bull FVG forming below. Oil catalyst WEAKENED: WTI $88.26 fading (not +6% $89 as prior tick). USDCAD actually RISING toward 1.3647 on weaker oil = CAD weak. Short thesis requires oil to RESUME rally (WTI break $90) AND M15 bear BOS. SL 1.3685, TP1 1.3600, TP2 1.3550.
